description: Reference lifecycle hook definitions for LightMem memory persistence. The production hook graph is hooks/hooks.json.

events.purpose: Detect repo state; inject compact hot context (initialized) or single-line nudge (uninitialized) via additionalContext. Matcher: startup|resume.
Append one JSONL entry to journal.jsonl after every assistant turn. Async — zero perceived latency. Scrubs secrets before persisting.
Write per-session summary to .claude/lightmem/sessions/<date>-<shortId>.md using idempotent marker blocks. Runs once-per-day auto-purge.
Append a timestamped line to compaction-log.txt and annotate the active session file. Minimal by design — no state synthesis.
Scan user message for [mem] tags; extract and append tagged lines to inbox/pending.md for later promotion via /lightmem:update. No LLM calls.
